title: Sales Manager Vacancy at My Home Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at My Home Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
